tool_purpose: Calculate the magnetic field strength at a point a certain distance away from a long wire carrying a current.

current.description: The current flowing through the wire in Amperes.

distance.description: The perpendicular distance from the wire to the point where the magnetic field is being calculated.

permeability.description: The permeability of the medium. Default is 12.57e-7 (Vacuum Permeability).

arguments.name: current
arguments.description: The current flowing through the wire in Amperes.

arguments.name: distance
arguments.description: The perpendicular distance from the wire to the point where the magnetic field is being calculated.

arguments.name: permeability
arguments.description: The permeability of the medium. Default is 12.57e-7 (Vacuum Permeability).
